admin-dashboard.notes: Full admin with login, 7 pages, social pack generator

sharing.notes: SharePanel on all content pages, 7 platforms + native share + copy link

chapter-images.notes: 18 chapters with Wikimedia Commons images, grayscale-to-color hover

analytics.notes: Server-side analytics with country detection, daily trends, top pages

social-packs.notes: 6 content packs with 10-slide Instagram carousels each

book-reader.notes: Full reading interface with TTS, font controls, download modal

evidence-system.notes: Three-tier with semantic CSS variables + dark mode variants

auth-system.notes: Neon PostgreSQL backend with JWT sessions, bcrypt hashing

nyt-design.notes: Monochrome palette, crimson accents, professional typography

seo.notes: JSON-LD all pages, per-chapter OG images (31 SVGs), Twitter cards, bot SSR, sitemap, feed.xml. Chapter-specific OG wired into setMetaTags + chapterJsonLd.

build-reliability.notes: TypeScript strict, clean build, lazy loading, code splitting

israel-dossier.notes: 10x expansion, now also accessible as tab on homepage

content-packs.notes: 6 packs + brand kit with 10 SVG assets, accessible as homepage tab

dossier-pdf.notes: Full A4 PDF with cover page, TOC

print-styles.notes: Comprehensive @page margins, grayscale evidence, URL expansion

hubspot-pipeline.notes: All major pages wired, newsletter, exit-intent, content gate, SPA tracking

ecommerce-optimization.notes: Conversion tracking, social proof, sticky membership bar, donation impact

google-translate.notes: 130+ languages via Google Translate Element API

deep-state-page.notes: Evidence tiers, subscriber capture, now also accessible as homepage tab

dark-mode.notes: Full semantic tokens, theme toggle in header, system preference default

accessibility.notes: Skip-nav, focus-visible, aria-labels, 44px touch targets, ARIA

reading-progress.notes: Crimson progress bar on long-form pages

cookie-consent.notes: GDPR-compliant banner with GA4 Consent Mode v2

chapter-pdf-export.notes: Per-chapter PDF with cover, evidence tiers, quotes

tabbed-record-page.notes: Left sidebar tabs (desktop) / bottom tabs (mobile) — 6 sections incl AIPAC. Lazy-loaded panels. Hash deep links (/#aipac). SEO meta re-asserts on tab switch.

brand-kit.notes: 10 SVG assets — logos, color palette, social banners, social profile. Downloadable from Content Packs tab.

community-forum.notes: Reddit-style forum at /forum with 6 topic categories. CommunityForum component with threading, voting, sort modes.

pwa.notes: manifest.json with brand assets, service worker registered, Add-to-Home-Screen ready

i18n-forum.notes: nav.forum translation key added to all 30+ languages

lead-scoring.notes: NEW: Unified lead scoring engine (leadScoring.ts). 11 behavioral events, 7 lifecycle stages, HubSpot + GA4 dual-fire. Wired into 7 components: ChapterPage, BookmarkButton, SearchPage, ContentGate, DonationBanner, NewsletterSignup, AuthContext.

per-chapter-og.notes: NEW: 31 unique 1200x630 SVG OG images auto-generated via scripts/generate-og-images.mjs. Wired into seo.ts setMetaTags + chapterJsonLd. ChapterPage passes chapter-specific image URL.

social-content-calendar.notes: 7-day rotating content calendar with platform-specific posts (X, LinkedIn, IG, FB, Reddit, Discord, TikTok). Stored in .claude-state/social-content-calendar.json.

aipac-data-layer.notes: NEW: FEC-sourced dataset — 100 senators, ~80 House reps, 5 executive branch officials. Career totals (PAC direct, IE, bundled donors). 6 key votes with roll-call breakdowns. 11 registered AIPAC lobbyists. Aggregate stats (126.9M 2024 cycle, 96% win rate).

aipac-interactive-diagram.notes: NEW: Hemicycle seating charts (Senate + House) with contribution-tier dot sizing. Search/filter by chamber/party/amount. MemberCard detail popup with PAC/IE/donor bar. Top 20 table. Collapsible key votes with yea/nay bars. Lobbyist profiles. Sortable full-member table. Sources/methodology footer.

aipac-page-seo.notes: NEW: AipacPage wrapper with Dataset structured data (schema.org). SEO meta for /#aipac hash. Lazy-loaded via Suspense in HomePage.

aipac-tab-integration.notes: NEW: 'aipac' added to RecordTab union. Globe icon in sidebar. Hash deep-link /#aipac. Section count updated to 6.

aipac-executive-branch.notes: NEW: 5 executive branch officials (Trump, Vance, Rubio, Hegseth, Stefanik) with pro-Israel policy stances displayed in card grid.
